rationale: Neither candidate surfaces the one substantive ground-truth concern (yenuo26's question about verifying the reduce_scatter parameter in the test); X at least discusses the reduce_scatter mock logic in its validated section, giving it a sliver of recall Y lacks entirely. X offers several concrete, grounded, actionable findings (untested branches for dp_group None/world_size==1, untested RuntimeError path, missing docstring) with specific file/line and suggested fixes, while Y offers only one vaguer 'worth a comment' note despite otherwise-solid technical verification. Y's analysis is accurate and its APPROVE verdict matches the actual light-touch human review, but it yields fewer actionable takeaways than X.
